Okay, I see the beginning animation of Up Smash

full_text: Up close, I mean, it just really speaks volumes. Okay, I see the beginning animation of Up Smash come out right now. Kurama's really digging deep to get this 3-stock against Monte here. Hold on.

corrections.original: Karamo's really digging deep to get this side take
corrections.corrected: Kurama's really digging deep to get this 3-stock
corrections.rule: player name + smash term: Karamo→Kurama, side take→3-stock
